---
title: ""
pagetitle: "ASA Clinical Trials Certificate Program"
---

```{=html}
<nav class="site-nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <div class="nav-logo">
      <span class="nav-badge">ASA</span>
      <span class="nav-title">Clinical Trials Certificate Program</span>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#about">About</a>
      <a href="#model">Program Model</a>
      <a href="#schedule">Schedule</a>
      <a href="#who">Who Should Apply</a>
      <a href="#apply" class="nav-apply">Apply Now</a>
    </div>
    <button class="nav-hamburger" aria-label="Open menu" onclick="document.querySelector('.nav-links').classList.toggle('open')">
      <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </button>
  </div>
</nav>
```

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-tag">
      <svg width="8" height="8" viewBox="0 0 8 8" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="4" fill="#c8872a"/></svg>
      American Statistical Association &middot; Certificate Program
    </div>
    <h1>Clinical Trials<br><em>Certificate Program</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-lead">A rigorous, cohort-based program for statisticians and data scientists ready to deepen their expertise in the design, analysis, and conduct of clinical trials.</p>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <span class="hero-stat-num">18</span>
        <span class="hero-stat-label">Instructional modules</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <span class="hero-stat-num">20</span>
        <span class="hero-stat-label">Cohort seats</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <span class="hero-stat-num">3 hrs</span>
        <span class="hero-stat-label">Per module</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <span class="hero-stat-num">1</span>
        <span class="hero-stat-label">Capstone project</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#apply" class="btn-primary">Apply to the cohort</a>
      <a href="#model" class="btn-outline">See the program model</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="section-about" id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">About the program</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Built for practitioners who want to lead in clinical research</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Whether you're early in your career or pivoting deeper into trials methodology, this program meets you where you are and takes you further.</p>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-card">
        <div class="about-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Cohort learning model</h3>
        <p>You'll move through the program alongside a carefully selected group of 20 peers, building professional relationships that extend beyond the certificate itself.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-card">
        <div class="about-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 21V9"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Applied from the start</h3>
        <p>Every module pairs recorded instruction with a live interactive session. You're not just absorbing content — you're working with it alongside faculty and peers.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-card">
        <div class="about-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Culminates in a capstone</h3>
        <p>The program closes with a practicum and capstone project presented to the cohort and program faculty — a tangible demonstration of your expertise.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-card">
        <div class="about-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="6"/><path d="M15.477 12.89 17 22l-5-3-5 3 1.523-9.11"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>ASA-credentialed</h3>
        <p>Earn a certificate from the American Statistical Association.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- PROGRAM MODEL -->
<section class="section-model" id="model">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Program model</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">How the program is structured</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">The eighteen modules, a practicum, and a capstone are designed as a complete arc from foundation to applied expertise.</p>

    <div class="module-flow">
      <div class="flow-step flow-step--light">
        <div class="flow-step-num">Phase 1</div>
        <h3>18 Modules</h3>
        <p>Core curriculum delivered in two-part sessions over the program period, with planned breaks for reflection and deeper engagement.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="flow-arrow" aria-hidden="true">&#8594;</div>
      <div class="flow-step flow-step--mid">
        <div class="flow-step-num">Phase 2</div>
        <h3>Practicum</h3>
        <p>Applied engagement with clinical trials methods in a supervised professional or simulated context.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="flow-arrow" aria-hidden="true">&#8594;</div>
      <div class="flow-step flow-step--dark">
        <div class="hero-stat">
  <span class="hero-stat-num">Sept</span>
  <span class="hero-stat-label">2026 cohort start</span>
</div>
    </div>

    <div class="session-grid">
      <div class="session-card">
        <div class="session-type">Part 1 of each module</div>
        <h4>90-minute recorded session</h4>
        <p>A pre-recorded instructional video available on demand. Watch on your own schedule, pause, and revisit as needed. Recorded sessions remain accessible throughout the entire program including during scheduled breaks.</p>
        <span class="session-tag">Some modules include embedded assessments</span>
      </div>
      <div class="session-card">
        <div class="session-type">Part 2 of each module</div>
        <h4>90-minute live interactive session</h4>
        <p>A synchronous session with faculty and the full cohort. Facilitated discussion, case application, and Q&amp;A build on the recorded material and connect it to real-world practice.</p>
        <span class="session-tag">Some sessions include live assessments</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- SCHEDULE -->
<section class="section-schedule" id="schedule">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Pacing &amp; schedule</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Designed to fit professional life</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Sessions run on a weekly cadence with planned breaks giving you time to absorb material, manage your workload, and show up ready.</p>

    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="tl-phase">
        <div class="tl-head">
          <div class="tl-num">Modules 1–6</div>
          <h4>Foundations</h4>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-body">Foundations of clinical research: trial design across early, middle, and late phases; writing objectives; selecting endpoints; and core principles of randomization.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-phase">
        <div class="tl-head">
          <div class="tl-num">Modules 7–12</div>
          <h4>Intermediate methods</h4>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-body">Statistical methodology in depth: power and sample size, analysis populations, analysis principles, interim analyses and monitoring, adaptive and Bayesian designs, and biomarkers in precision medicine.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-phase">
        <div class="tl-head">
          <div class="tl-num">Modules 13–18</div>
          <h4>Advanced topics</h4>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-body">Advanced and applied topics: specialized trial designs, dissemination and reporting, protocol development and execution, regulation and oversight, data capture and management, and emerging trends shaping the future of clinical trials.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-phase">
        <div class="tl-head tl-head--gold">
          <div class="tl-num">Final phase</div>
          <h4>Practicum + Capstone</h4>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-body">Applied project with faculty guidance, closing with a capstone presentation to the cohort.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="schedule-note">
      <strong>Flexible access:</strong> Recorded sessions are available throughout the program.
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- WHO SHOULD APPLY -->
<section class="section-who" id="who">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Who should apply</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">This program is for you if&hellip;</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">…you're ready to go deeper. Whether you're building your foundation or formalizing expertise you've gained on the job, this program is designed for statisticians and data scientists who want to do more rigorous, impactful work in clinical research.</p>
    <div class="who-grid">
      <div class="who-card">
        <span class="who-badge">Early career</span>
        <h3>Statisticians &amp; biostatisticians building a foundation</h3>
        <p>You have a degree in statistics, biostatistics, or a quantitative field and want structured, expert-led preparation for clinical trials work.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="who-card">
        <span class="who-badge">Mid-career</span>
        <h3>Professionals deepening or redirecting their expertise</h3>
        <p>You work in industry, biotech, academia, or government and want to formalize your knowledge or transition more fully into trials methodology.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="who-card">
        <span class="who-badge">Academic &amp; research</span>
        <h3>Researchers engaged in clinical study design</h3>
        <p>You collaborate on or lead clinical research and want deeper statistical grounding to strengthen your contributions to study teams.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="who-card">
        <span class="who-badge">Data science</span>
        <h3>Data scientists moving into regulated research</h3>
        <p>You bring strong quantitative skills and want to understand the specific frameworks, standards, and methods that govern clinical trials.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- APPLICATION -->
<section class="section-apply" id="apply">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label">Application</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Apply to the inaugural cohort</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">The first cohort will include 20 participants selected through a competitive review process. We evaluate applications holistically.</p>
    <div class="app-grid">
      <div class="app-components">

        <div class="app-item">
          <div class="app-item-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="app-item-text">
            <h4>CV or résumé</h4>
            <p>Your academic and professional background. PDF or Word document.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="app-item">
          <div class="app-item-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="app-item-text">
            <h4>Short-answer questions</h4>
            <p>Two prompts (approximately 200–300 words each) that give the selection committee a clear picture of your background and motivation.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="app-prompts">
          <ol>
            <li>What draws you to clinical trials specifically, and how does this certificate connect to your professional goals?</li>
            <li>Is there anything about your background or circumstances you'd like the selection committee to know?</li>
          </ol>
        </div>


      <div class="app-cta-box">
        <h3>Ready to apply?</h3>
        <p>The inaugural cohort begins September 2026. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis and closes once all available seats are filled.</p>
        <div class="cohort-badge">
  <span class="cohort-num">20</span>
  <span class="cohort-label">Cohort seats available<br>Competitive selection</span>
</div>
<div class="cohort-badge">
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;">
    <span class="cohort-label" style="color:var(--gold);font-size:15px;font-weight:600;">ASA Members: $3,500</span>
    <span class="cohort-label" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-size:15px;font-weight:600;">Non-members: $4,500</span>
  </div>
</div>

        <a href="https://amstat.jotform.com/form/clinical-trials-certificate-program" class="btn-apply" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Start your application &#8594;</a>
        <p class="app-contact">Questions? Contact <a href="mailto:donnal@amstat.org">donnal@amstat.org</a></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <p>&copy; 2025 American Statistical Association &middot; Clinical Trials Certificate Program</p>
    <a href="https://www.amstat.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener">amstat.org</a>
  </div>
</footer>
```
